title: Rum Punch Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Rum Punch | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: Rum Punch Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Rum Punch | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Spiced rum COCKTAILS Rum Punch Having a get together? Serve up Rum Punch. Combining BACARDÍ Spiced rum, BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum and a blend of fruit juices, it's a party pleaser. Having a get together? Serve up Rum Punch. How to make a Rum Punch 150 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 75 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 37.5 ml grenadine 150 ml orange juice 75 ml cranberry juice 150 ml pineapple juice Servings Copy Rum Punch ingredients Copied! Rum Punch recipe One step at a time 1 Mix In a large container, combine all the liquid ingredients. 2 Chill Refrigerate the mix until chilled. 3 Get set Just before serving, pour into a large punch bowl, stirring in ice. 4 Garnish Garnish the bowl with floating lemon slices. Serve with a single lemon wheel. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED rum COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS Hurricane Zombie Jungle Bird Lime Cooler Cuatro Smash DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? How do you make rum? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone.
